channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside opticians, 5th June
item.description:
Newspapers scattered everywhere and multiple bin bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Fly tipped waste, 5th June
item.description:
Fly tipped commercial waste from the nearby watermelon business

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shaftesbury Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree uprooting disturbing paving, 5th June
item.description:
The cherry tree has fallen over to an unsafe angle, dislodging paving stones and making the pavement difficult to navigate. Potentially dangerous to people with reduced mobility

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cranford Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown garden obstructing pavement, 5th June
item.description:
5 clarence road need to clear their overgrown garden, its blocking most of the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The ivy growing up the tree trunk is causing major issues when pulling ioff drive at 105 blocking the view of on coming cars up the hill causing driving safety issues of pulling off drive, 5th June
item.description:
Driving safety hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Poverest Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping corner of whitely & alexandra, 5th June
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Whiteley Road, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Hole. In. Road, 5th June
item.description:
Hole. In. Road. Has. A. Small. Drain. Cover On. Sidcup hill Near. Chuch avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Church Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Leaking water fountain, 5th June
item.description:
Water fountain has been leaking for a very long time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushcroft Road, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Dumped waste, 5th June
item.description:
Dumped waste has been here over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rattray Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dislodged & Uneven Paving Slab, 5th June
item.description:
Dislodged and uneven paving slab outside 23 Arlington Road. I nearly tripped over it today and considering the entrance to Ashmole School is a stones throw away, it poses a dangerous hazard to school children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Arlington Road, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Sainsbury's trolley, 5th June
item.description:
Abandoned Sainsbury's trolley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hither Green Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously, 5th June
item.description:
Overcrowded Lime hire bikes left abandoned blocking the pavement and road dangerously as shown in picture. Might hurt somebody. Opposite Hippodrome casino at Little Newport Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Endless Flytipping, 5th June
item.description:
I repoted this once already they had an enviromental officer call me who said he would investigate and it looks like he just closed the report. They stuff is still there and rotten food is now spreading across the street. Can you please come and clear this up. I dont get how this is hard. We get stuffed dumped here every 2 weeks. Its been there since monday. Its under a ccvt on the building. This really gives the vibe the council dont care about the estate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drummond Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Cleaning needed in Cockmannings Road, 5th June
item.description:
Both sides (roadside and verges) need cleaning after Riney asphalted the roads did not leave it clear x tarmac rocks left outside house numbers 4 to 6 quite a mess !! Thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cockmannings Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40 mile sign needs cleaning in Cockmannings Road, 5th June
item.description:
Just before Waldens Road both 40 mile signs are unclear either needs new signs or cleaning thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cockmannings Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van, 5th June
item.description:
Large work-van has been parked on the road for two weeks. It has not moved or been accessed since. Its MOT has expired.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmcroft Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Front garden rubbish, 5th June
item.description:
Rubbish left in front garden, rats have been spotted

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roding Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard destroyed in Cockmannings Road, 5th June
item.description:
Bollard destroyed corner of Cockmannings Road and Rookesley Road near post box many thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cockmannings Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter from litter picking group for collection, 5th June
item.description:
We have been litter picking in the area of the Cray and have left the litter at the far end of the narrow lane part of Water Lane. This is 4 black sacks, a wooden cable drum, a plastic chair, part of a boat and a traffic cone. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Water Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned and blocking the parking for residents, 5th June
item.description:
This car has been parked in the same spot for the last 2 weeks. It is not parked in the right place and as far as I know it doesn't have the permit to park there and doesn't belong to any neighbours as I have knocked on our neighbours doors and none of them said it belonged to them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marshalls Grove, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
